CVE-2021-39360.title: In GNOME libzapojit through 0.0.3, zpj-skydrive.c does not enable ...
CVE-2021-39360.summary: In GNOME libzapojit through 0.0.3, zpj-skydrive.c does not enable TLS certificate verification on the SoupSessionSync objects it creates, leaving users vulnerable to network MITM attacks. NOTE: this is similar to CVE-2016-20011.
